import java.io.IOException; import java.io.FileWriter; public class Main2 { public static void main( String[] args ) { // Try to open, write, and close randInt.txt file try { FileWriter writer = new FileWriter( "randInt.txt", true ); writer.write("line 1
"); writer.write("line 2
"); writer.write("line 3
"); writer.close () ; }catch ( IOException ioException ) { System.err.println( "Java Exception: " + ioException ); } System.out.println( "All Done!" ); } }
